title: Deleting and Uninstalling
drDigitalIntro: Drag an app to Trash to uninstall it, or right-click and choose Move to Trash. Some apps have an uninstaller — run it to remove the app completely. Deleting an app frees up space on your computer. If you buy an app from the app store, you can reinstall it free anytime. Deleting an app doesn't delete your documents — those stay safely in your folders.

playgroundTask.question: You delete the Pages app. What happens to your Pages documents?

options.text: They stay safely in your Documents folder
They move to the cloud automatically
They are emailed to you as a backup

drDigitalSuccess: Documents are separate from apps — deleting an app never touches your files.
drDigitalHint: Apps live in the Applications folder. Your documents live in your personal folders like Documents or Desktop. They're separate.
